name: ollama-codex
description: Configure Codex App and Codex CLI to use Ollama for local and Ollama Cloud models.

interface.shortDescription: Use Ollama with Codex App and Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Use Ollama for Codex to configure every official Ollama/Codex path from the current Ollama docs. For Codex App, run `ollama launch codex-app`, switch to a local or Ollama Cloud model with `ollama launch codex-app --model <model>`, and restore the previous App profile with `ollama launch codex-app --restore`. For Codex CLI, run `ollama launch codex`, configure without launching via `ollama launch codex --config`, restore via `ollama launch codex --restore`, run manually with `codex --oss`, use a specific local or cloud model with `codex --oss -m <model>`, or use the generated `ollama-launch` profile with `codex --profile ollama-launch`. The plugin checks local readiness, lists or pulls models, preserves App/CLI profile separation, and delegates configuration to Ollama instead of hand-editing Codex config files. Codex App support requires Ollama v0.24.0 or newer; Codex CLI works best with models configured for at least a 64k context window.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex App with Ollama
Switch Codex App to an Ollama model
Run Codex CLI with an Ollama model
